description.default: Please read these terms carefully before browsing or purchasing from our website.

default.title: Overview
default.body:
Welcome to Tom & Stefanie. By accessing or purchasing from our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.
These terms apply to all users of the site, including customers browsing, purchasing online, or visiting our retail stores.

default.title: Products & Availability
default.body: Tom & Stefanie offers a curated range of baby and children products, including both imported brands and in-house selections.
items: All products are subject to availability
Product images are for illustration purposes and may differ slightly
We reserve the right to update product details and pricing without prior notice

default.title: Orders & Payments
items: All orders are subject to confirmation and acceptance
Orders may be cancelled if items are out of stock or due to unforeseen issues
Payment methods include Credit / Debit Cards, PayNow / PayLah, and other methods displayed at checkout

default.title: Delivery
default.body: We currently offer delivery within Singapore.
items: Delivery timelines provided are estimates only
Delays may occur due to logistics, peak periods, or unforeseen circumstances
Customers are responsible for providing accurate delivery details
Self-collection may be introduced in the future

default.title: Returns & Exchanges
default.body: Please refer to our Return & Exchange Policy for full details.

default.title: Product Safety
default.body: Tom & Stefanie shall not be liable for misuse of products.
items: All products are sourced from trusted suppliers
Adult supervision is recommended where applicable
Customers should follow product instructions and age recommendations

default.title: Intellectual Property
default.body: All website content including images, branding, and text are owned by Tom & Stefanie and may not be reproduced without permission.

default.title: Limitation of Liability
default.body: We are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website.

default.title: Governing Law
default.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Singapore.

default.title: Contact
default.body: For enquiries, customers may contact us via WhatsApp, email, or visit our stores.
